title: consolida gombaultii
intro: Consolida gombaultii, also known as the Gombault's larkspur, is a plant species in the genus Consolida, which is a group of annual or biennial flowering plants. It contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, such as delphinine and ajacine, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Consolida gombaultii include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, as well as its use as a diuretic and antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Consolida gombaultii can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to promote relaxation and ease respiratory issues.
